events.event_description: Alexander Asboth presented credentials as the first U.S. Minister Resident to Uruguay, establishing a U.S. legation.

evidence.quote: Alexander Asboth, Minister Resident. Appointed: 1867-04-05. Credentials presented: 1867-10-02. Died at Buenos Aires 1868-01-21.

events.event_description: William Dawson presented credentials as the first U.S. Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary to Uruguay, elevating the mission from a legation to an embassy.

evidence.quote: William Dawson, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1941-02-11. Credentials presented: 1941-07-12. Left post on 1946-08-06.
